category_sources: Official IGV documentation describes IGV as an interactive tool for visual exploration of genomic data.
display_name_sources: Official IGV documentation uses Integrative Genomics Viewer as the project name.
source_facts.description expands IGV as Interactive Genomics Viewer.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official IGV Desktop documentation site with user guide, file formats, release notes, and source-code links.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official IGV desktop documentation states the source code repository is hosted at https://github.com/igvteam/igv.
tags_sources: Official IGV documentation says it visualizes genomic data and lists IGV Desktop and igvtools-related documentation.
